title: 2026 Oscars Best Actor Predictions - IndieWire
text: Michael B. Jordan (Sinners) leads the Best Actor race according to IndieWire's predictions. Sinners has demonstrated strong support from the Actors Branch, winning Best Ensemble and Best Actor at the Actor Awards. Jordan faces competition from: Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme), Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent), Ethan Hawke (Blue Moon), Leonardo DiCaprio (One Battle After Another). Awards Editor Marcus Jones emphasizes that while One Battle After Another dominates many categories, the acting races show surprising competitiveness. He notes voter enthusiasm for Jordan's performance reflects the largest Academy branch's preferences. The predictions acknowledge that despite One Battle After Another winning numerous craft awards, the acting categories remain less predictable, with several contenders maintaining viable paths to victory through different voting coalitions.
